overview.description: The Return Stacked U.S. Stocks & Gold/Bitcoin ETF (RSSX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through investments in US large-cap stocks, gold, and bitcoin. The fund uses leverage to stack the total return of its equity holdings with the potential returns of gold and bitcoin RSSX was launched on May 29, 2025 and is issued by Return Stacked.
